name: No-Bread Sandwiches
keywords: cheese eggs main dish sandwiches vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 Large Hard Cooked Eggs, Peeled and Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the eggs.
2. Combine the chopped eggs with celery, hot pepper sauce, and mayonnaise in a bowl. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to meld.
3. Spread half of the egg salad filling onto 4 cheese slices.
4. Place tomato slices on top of the filling.
5. Add lettuce leaves and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Top with remaining cheese slices.
7. Serve on individual plates alongside a dill pickle wedge and stuffed olive.
